problem: How does central sensitization maintain chronic pain without tissue damage?
hypothesis: If BDNF upregulation to promote neurogenesis is applied to without, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 12 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
